name: Can I get workers comp for gradual hearing loss from years of loud machinery?
description: Yes, if medically linked to job noise exposure; get audiogram and file claim.[4]

mainEntity.name: Can I get workers comp for gradual hearing loss from years of loud machinery?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if medically linked to job noise exposure; get audiogram and file claim.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, gradual hearing loss from occupational noise exposure qualifies as a compensable occupational disease in most states including Utah and Idaho.** Prolonged exposure to noise above safe levels without adequate protection entitles you to benefits like medical care and disability pay.[1][2][4] Prove causation with audiograms showing noise-induced patterns, work history of exposure, and expert medical opinions.[2] Employer-provided hearing protection use may reduce but not eliminate claims if noise was harmful.[2] File promptly and gather evidence before symptoms worsen.
